'''tharobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillogenesis|fibrillogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillogenesis|fibrillogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tharobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thærebeth || thærebej || thærebesh || thærebe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || tharoroboth || tharoroboj || tharorobosh || tharorobo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tharoboth || tharoboj || tharobosh || tharobo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tharofbofth || tharofbofj || tharofbofsh || tharofbof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tharobotho || tharobojo || tharobosho || tharoboko
|-
| [[Patient]] || tharoboth || tharoboj || tharobosh || tharobo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tharobothol || tharobojol || tharoboshol || tharobokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tharoboothotho || tharoboojojo || tharobooshosho || tharobooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || tharobothon || tharobojon || tharoboshon || tharobokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tharobothooro || tharobojooro || tharoboshooro || tharobokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
